narrative:
Brookfield Twp A (precinct in Trumbull County) has 903 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
